message:
feat(widgets): add tabs widget, IME composition, list filtering/multi-select, and palette theming

Major widget improvements across the ftui-widgets crate:

Tabs widget (new):
- Add `crates/ftui-widgets/src/tabs.rs` (715 lines) implementing a
  full-featured Tabs widget with TabsState, keyboard navigation,
  mouse click handling, horizontal scrolling for overflow, and
  customizable styling. Includes comprehensive test coverage.
- Re-export Tab, Tabs, TabsState from crate root.

TextInput IME composition support:
- Add IME lifecycle methods: ime_start_composition(),
  ime_update_composition(), ime_commit_composition(),
  ime_cancel_composition(), and ime_composition() getter.
- IME commit inserts preedit text at cursor, cancel discards it.
- Add tracing instrumentation for edit operations with structured
  span fields (operation name, cursor position, grapheme count).
- Add comprehensive test coverage for IME composition flows.

List widget filtering and multi-select:
- Add incremental case-insensitive filter query (type-to-search).
- Add multi-select mode with Ctrl+click and Space toggle support.
- Add keyboard navigation within filtered results (Up/Down/j/k).
- Persist filter_query, multi_select_enabled, and multi_selected
  in ListPersistState for state restoration.
- Add tracing instrumentation for selection changes.

CommandPalette theming and rounded corners:
- Replace hardcoded dark surface color with palette_background()
  that resolves from explicit style backgrounds with fallback.
- Add set_style() mutable setter for runtime palette theming.
- Switch border characters from sharp corners to rounded Unicode
  box-drawing characters (rounded corners look nicer).
- Add test verifying rounded corner rendering.

Block widget:
- Fix chrome_size() and measure() tests to account for bordered()
  including 1-cell padding on each side (chrome = 4, not 2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
